inputs.label: Distillate mole fraction (xD)
inputs.businessContext: Mole fraction of more volatile component in distillate

businessContext_i18n.en: Mole fraction of more volatile component in distillate
businessContext_i18n.tr: Distilattaki daha uçucu bileşenin mol kesri
businessContext_i18n.de: Molenbruch der leichterflüchtigen Komponente im Destillat
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction molaire du composant le plus volatil dans le distillat
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción molar del componente más volátil en el destilado

inputs.label: Bottoms mole fraction (xB)
inputs.businessContext: Mole fraction of more volatile component in bottoms

businessContext_i18n.en: Mole fraction of more volatile component in bottoms
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dipte kalan daha uçucu bileşenin mol kesri
businessContext_i18n.de: Molenbruch der leichterflüchtigen Komponente im Sumpf
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction molaire du composant le plus volatil dans le résidu
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción molar del componente más volátil en el residuo

inputs.label: Feed mole fraction (xF)
inputs.businessContext: Mole fraction of more volatile component in feed

businessContext_i18n.en: Mole fraction of more volatile component in feed
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beslemedeki daha uçucu bileşenin mol kesri
businessContext_i18n.de: Molenbruch der leichterflüchtigen Komponente im Zulauf
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction molaire du composant le plus volatil dans l'alimentation
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción molar del componente más volátil en la alimentación

inputs.label: Reflux ratio (R)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of liquid returned to column to distillate removed

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of liquid returned to column to distillate removed
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kolona geri dönen sıvının alınan distilata oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis des in die Kolonne zurückgeführten Flüssigkeitsstroms zum abgezogenen Destillat
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport du liquide retourné à la colonne sur le distillat retiré
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre el líquido devuelto a la columna y el destilado extraído

inputs.label: Relative volatility (α)
inputs.businessContext: Relative volatility of more volatile component

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative volatility of more volatile component
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volatilité relative du composant le plus volatil
businessContext_i18n.es: Volatilidad relativa del componente más volátil

inputs.label: Feed quality (q)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of feed that is liquid (1 for saturated liquid, 0 for saturated vapor)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of feed that is liquid (1 for saturated liquid, 0 for saturated vapor)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beslemenin sıvı olan kesri (doygun sıvı için 1, doygun buhar için 0)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil des Einspeisematerials, das flüssig ist (1 für gesättigte Flüssigkeit, 0 für gesättigten Dampf)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction de l'alimentation qui est liquide (1 pour liquide saturé, 0 pour vapeur saturée)
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción de la alimentación que es líquida (1 para líquido saturado, 0 para vapor saturado)

breakdown: nMin: Minimum number of theoretical stages
nActual: Actual number of theoretical stages
operatingLineSlope: Slope of operating line (rectifying section)
operatingLineIntercept: Intercept of operating line (rectifying section)
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
